TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Knaziy ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 84 buwan, 264 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 253 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Bunun 2%, Setik 3%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Knaziy hya' ga bubun. tay mkyahu' na Knaziy hya' ga bayi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ knazij ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa βuβun. taj mkjaħuʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa βaji. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Knaziy ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 84 buwan, 264 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 253 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Bunun 2%, Setik 3%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Knaziy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Knaziy hya' ga bubun. tay mkyahu' na Knaziy hya' ga bayi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ knazij ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa βuβun. taj mkjaħuʔ na knazij ħjaʔ ɣa βaji. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
